title: Workplace Template Column Ids

posts.author: cartersingle (Carter Singletary)
posts.cookedHtml: My team is working to build a multi-tenet Monday app integration. We want to use a workplace template to share board views. When users install that workplace will all of the column and sub item column ids stay the same or will they update with the new template? Thanks.

posts.author: cartersingle (Carter Singletary)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday Could you look into this?

posts.author: venom85jojes (Venom Jojes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Carter Singletary:

My team is working to build a multi-tenet Monday app integration. We want to use a workplace template to share board views. When users install that workplace will all of the column and sub item column ids stay the same or will they update with SSMSmartSquare the new template? Thanks.

will the column and sub-item column IDs stay the same when a user installs the template, or will they generate new IDs?
